\tzpentry{ID5710}{Nlambda Eigenvalue}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5710 introduces Nlambda Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} n\lambda = 2\pi R_\oplus \implies \lambda = \pi R_\oplus \approx 20{,}015 \text{ km} \quad (n=2) \end{equation}
